diagrams.title: 4-to-2 Encoder Block Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows the input-output relationship of a basic encoder converting 4 input lines to 2 output lines
diagrams.purpose: Understanding encoder as a black box that compresses 2^n inputs to n outputs

diagrams.title: 4-to-2 Encoder Circuit Implementation
diagrams.description: Logic circuit implementation using OR gates
elements: 4 input lines with NOT gates shown
Two OR gates for Y0 and Y1 outputs
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how Boolean expressions translate to gate-level implementation

diagrams.title: Priority Encoder Truth Table
diagrams.description: Complete truth table showing input-output relationship for 4-to-2 priority encoder with priority order D3 > D2 > D1 > D0
elements: X (don't care) for lower priority inputs when higher priority is active
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how priority resolves ambiguity in multiple simultaneous inputs

diagrams.title: Encoder vs Decoder Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison showing inverse relationship between encoder and decoder
diagrams.purpose: Clarifying the difference and relationship between these complementary circuits
